channel.title: The Beholder's Gazette
channel.description: Your premier source for satirical news from across the realms. All the news that's fit to print (or burn).

item.title: Lord Donwald Secures High Council Seat After Hard-Fought Campaign
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: The Golden Tower shines brighter today. Archmage Joebid retires to his farm. Merchants brace for new trade decrees.

item.title: Candlekeep Librarians Reject AI-Generated Spellbooks
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Automated quills produce errors in components. Wizards demand human verification. Plagiarism scandals erupt.

item.title: Magic Coin Cryptocurrency Crashes After Rug Pull
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Investors lose fortunes in DragonCoin scheme. Developers vanish via teleportation circle. Regulators demand oversight.

item.title: Owlbear Migration Grounds All Flying Brooms
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Seasonal nesting blocks air corridors. Commuters forced to walk. Airlines offer refund vouchers.

item.title: Alchemists Launch Healing Potion Soda Flavors
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Cherry burst and mountain dew variants hit shelves. Clerics warn against casual consumption. Sugar rush side effects reported.

item.title: Royal Revenue Service Audits Adventurer Hoards
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Tax day arrives. Wizards caught hiding gold in extra-dimensional spaces. Penalties include forced community service cleaning sewers.

item.title: ScrollTok Influencer Promotes Cursed Amulet
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Followers turn into newts after using discount code. Platform claims no responsibility for magical side effects.

item.title: Druids Plant Trees That Bite Back
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Reforestation project goes awry. Saplings identified as aggressive mimic variants. City orders immediate containment.

item.title: Resurrection Insurance Premiums Skyrocket
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Necromancer monopoly drives up costs. Clerics demand better working conditions. Dead waitlists grow longer.

item.title: Broomstick Traffic Jams Ground Commuters
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Airspace regulations ignored. Collisions reported near tower districts. Wizard proposes mandatory flying licenses.

item.title: Starbuck's Mystical Brews Opens Near Dungeon Entrance
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Local cafes AstralDoe and Moondeer protest corporate gentrification. Customers confused by size names like 'Gargantuan'.

item.title: Oracle Echo Stones Accused of Listening to Private Conversations
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Wizards deny allegations. Merchants receive targeted ads based overheard spell components.

item.title: Phantom Carriage Surge Pricing During Raid Events
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Commuters stranded as prices multiply during dragon attacks. Drivers cancel rides if passengers look too much like loot goblins.

item.title: Landlords Renting Out Bags of Holding as Apartments
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Tenants complain of lack of windows and air. Safety violations cited after a sneeze ejects a family into the Astral Plane.

item.title: Elemental Fire Leak Causes Unseasonable Heatwave
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Druids protest Artificer factories. City sells cooling charms at inflated prices. Crops wilting in the fields.

item.title: Adventurer's Guild Mandates Ramps for Gelatinous Cubes
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: New dungeon safety laws require wide corridors. Delvers complain stealth is impossible with construction crews everywhere.

item.title: Mass Recall Issued for 'Whiner +1' Magic Swords
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: The blades scream constantly during combat. Manufacturers offer free mute spells. Paladins return them in droves.

item.title: College of Valor Accused of Song Plagiarism
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Famous ballad found to be written by a mute kobold. Dean resigns. Students demand tuition refund in gold.

item.title: Healing Potions Found to be Watered Down
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Alchemists caught adding tap water to red vials. Adventurers report feeling only slightly less dead. Investigation ongoing.

item.title: Mimic Infestation Hits Suburban Mailboxes
item.author: gazette@beholders-gazette.com (Gobwiz Quillnib)
item.description: Residents bitten while checking bills. Postal service issues armored gloves. Mimics demand stamp payment.
